title: Make project cards more compact

requirements.text: Reduce the visual size of ProjectCard components so more cards fit on screen at once. Specifically: shrink the thumbnail/placeholder image area height (from the current tall placeholder to a much shorter one), reduce internal padding throughout the card, condense the title font size, shorten the description text area, and tighten spacing between the date rows. The status badge position and card click behavior must remain unchanged.

quotes: this project size visually is too big. I need them smaller.
smaller thumbnail, tighter padding, condensed text, and reduced spacing between elements — so more cards fit on screen at once

acceptanceCriteria: The thumbnail/placeholder area height is noticeably reduced compared to the current version (e.g., from ~230px tall to ~120px or less)
Card internal padding is tighter so cards take up less vertical and horizontal space
Title font size is reduced while remaining legible
Description text is capped at fewer lines (1–2 lines max) with ellipsis overflow
Date rows (Completion and Amazon Upload) are more compact with reduced spacing between them
At least 3–4 cards are visible per row on a standard desktop viewport
Status badge remains visible and correctly positioned on each card
Clicking a card still navigates to the project detail page

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui/
Do not change the data model, backend logic, or any CRUD operations
Preserve the existing color theme and typography system
nonGoals: Changing the card layout from grid to list view
Modifying the status overview section at the top of the dashboard
